title: 1138 (disambiguation)
content:
{{Otheruses|THX}}
[[1138 (easter egg)|'''1138''']] is a number commonly associated with various [[George Lucas]] projects, honoring his first feature film, [[1971]]'s [[Wikipedia:THX 1138|''THX 1138'']]. In ''[[Star Wars]]'', 1138 refers to the following items:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[1138 (First Order)|1138]]''' was a First Order stormtrooper that served in the decades after the Galactic Civil War.
*'''[[1138 (Geonosis)|1138]]''' was a [[B1-series battle droid]] who fought in the [[First Battle of Geonosis]].
*'''[[1138 (Trade Federation)|1138]]''' was a B1 battle droid of the [[Trade Federation]].
*'''[[Cell Block 1138]]''' was an alleged location within the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station|DS-1 Death Star Mobile Battle Station]].
*[[Bacara]], designated '''CC-1138''', was a [[Clone Marshal Commander]] within the [[Grand Army of the Republic]].
*[[Boss (clone commando)|Boss]], designated '''RC-1138''', was a [[clone commando]] within the [[Galactic Republic]].
*The '''[[Spaceport THX1138 system]]'''

===Non-canon===
*'''[[B-14961138815]]''' was a [[B1-series battle droid]] who broke down a door with an ax
*'''[[KT-1138]]''', a First Order stormtrooper also named "'''Kaity'''" and "'''Kaitlyn'''."
*'''[[SPF 1138]]''' was a sunscreen used by [[Sith Lord]]s

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[1138 (Confederacy of Independent Systems)|1138]]''' was a [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] in the service of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].
*'''[[1138 (CR90 corvette)|1138]]''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] in operation during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
*'''[[1138 (stormtrooper)|1138]]''' was a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] on [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]].
*'''[[Jedi training droid/Legends#Training Droid 1138|1138]]''' was the designation for a [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]].
*'''[[1138 (Trade Federation)/Legends|1138]]''' was the designation of a [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-Series battle droid]] seen just after the destruction of the [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|Droid Control Ship]] during the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]].
*'''[[1-138]]''' was the designation of an automated hauler that [[Kyle Katarn]] flew to the [[Cairn Installation]] in the [[Lenico Belt]].
*9573'''THX1138'''C25N was the prisoner number for [[Qan Gindoch]]
*'''[[Block 1138 Sable]]''' was a room block on the [[Errant Venture/Legends|''Errant Venture'']].
*'''CC-1138''' was the number for the [[Clone Commander/Legends|clone trooper commander]] [[Bacara/Legends|Bacara]].
*'''[[Cell Block 1138/Legends|Cell Block 1138]]''' allegedly was a detention block aboard the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]] from which [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] claimed to be transferring [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] as a [[Prison/Legends|prisoner]].
*'''[[DFS-1138]]''' was a [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|''Vulture'' droid]].
*'''[[Docking bay 1138]]''', a [[Hangar/Legends|docking bay]] located on the planet [[Druckenwell/Legends|Druckenwell]]
*'''[[Docking bay TH X-11-38]]''', a docking bay situated within the [[Realspace/Legends|space]] [[City/Legends|city]] [[New Tayana]].
*'''''[[One Thousand, One Hundred and Thirty-Eight Wonders of the Ancient Galaxy]]''''', a book written by [[Ualp Xathan]].
*'''[[Order 1138]]''', an order that was given by the [[Thaereian military]].
*'''[[Patrol 1138]]''' was a five-man patrol of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]].
*'''RC-1138''' was the number for the [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] [[Boss (clone commando)/Legends|Boss]].
*'''[[Section 1138]]''', a law that was a part of the [[Galactic Republic Charter]]
*'''[[Spaceport THX1138]]''', a terminal for [[Star Tours/Legends|Star Tours]] and other travel agencies
**'''[[Raid at Spaceport THX1138]]''', an altercation that took place here
*'''[[Spacestation 1138]]''', a [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] prison
*'''[[Star Tours Flight 1138]]''', a flight itinerary to [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]]
*'''[[Galen Marek|Subject 1138]]''' was the name given to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] secret [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]] while he was on board the ''[[Empirical]]''.
**'''[[Subject 1138]]''', a clone of the original Starkiller
*'''[[TK-421|THX-1138]]''' was another stormtrooper.
*'''[[Trihexalophine1138]]''' was the number of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Bioweapon/Legends|bioweapon]] that devastated [[Honoghr/Legends|Honoghr]].

{{Disambig}}
